title: The Kawai Complex Guide to Manors and Hostel Behavior
sourceNotes: Single-cour 12-episode TV anime (2014) adapting manga volumes 1-3 (chapters 1-28). Manga complete at 94 chapters across 11 volumes; the anime covers roughly the first third, leaving the remainder unadapted. A side-story OVA and 4-koma spinoff exist but are excluded here.
